name: Kathy Laub
body: Wow what a song. I can just picture you guys singing, praying these words. Thanks you for this blessing. Praying that for you all today. 🙏🙏🙏

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Praying for each of your precious children, and especially Lyla, and for you, Lee and Kayla, for all you have need of in this day.

name: Karling Ward
body: The faith your family has (especially Lyla) through these extremely difficult times is so inspiring. We are continuing to pray for healing for Lyla and strength for your entire family! Hang in there 💜 We hope you are all feeling the love and prayers that surround you!

name: Natalie Rynard
body: Lee, I am in awe at the kind of faithful parents (and children) you all are at this very trying time. It’s such a lesson to all of us that no matter what is given to us in our daily lives, have faith and lean into Him. It’s not always easy to do, but you guys are doing it so well. I appreciate the updates you provide and I also pass them along to my prayer warriors who have kept ur whole family in prayer. We lift you all up, today and every day, and ask for peace, strong faith, guidance, wisdom and humility (and miracles!!). Lyla is in good hands🙏🏻. She continues to teach this old girl some life lessons as I read the things you write. May God be with all of you and I (for one) thank you again for these updates. Stay strong🙏🏻🙏🏻❤️

name: Kari Tarvin
body: Lee, you voiced what I wouldn't be able to right now. But thanks. I needed to breathe that, pray that and rest in that as I awoke this morning. Micah is in good hands, hug sweet Lyla until I get up there to see her myself. Love you all!

name: Mindy Leach
body: Thank you for taking the time out of the "madness" to keep us all updated. We love Lyla and continue to pray for complete healing for her, as well as peace and strength for you, Kayla, and Micah. Please give her a hug from me and tell her how much I love her! ❤️

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Praying alongside you for wisdom, peace, and healing. We love you all.
